programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Salisbury, North Carolina, a veteran's dream home becomes a battlefield over a disputed driveway; in Manhattan, luxury lobby tensions erupt when one man refuses to leash his dog and his temper.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Georgia, appliance delivery drivers find themselves the target of a homeowner's rage when the refrigerator she orders doesn't fit; a Florida woman unleashes her fury on police after causing a disturbance in her apartment complex lobby.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Laguna Beach, California, a woman tries to gatekeep the sand in front of her beachfront home, spoiling a family's beach day; across the pond in London, a mom goes head-to-head with a neighbor who's fed up with her kids.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, a dispute over a pear tree takes a shocking turn when one neighbor pulls out a weapon; in Illinois, a woman washing her car faces off with her neighbor after water splashes onto her driveway; and in Michigan, 20 years of tension between neighbors snaps when one of them chops firewood with a chainsaw.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In New Jersey, an angry neighbor accosts two young fishermen who are trespassing on his riverbank; a Texas man provokes a family with vulgar taunts at all hours of the day and night; and at a marina in Hawaii, neighbors rush to rescue a mother and son trapped in a sinking minivan.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.
